gui.betterenchanting.pedestal.orb.upgrad: Use again to perform this upgrade
message.betterenchanting.machine.slot_fu: That machine slot is occupied or full
message.betterenchanting.pedestal.select: Selected %s — use the gold orb again to upgrade
message.betterenchanting.pedestal.power_: Table power %s/%s — add more shelf power
tooltip.betterenchanting.arcane_crucible: Use ingredients directly on the block to store them
tooltip.betterenchanting.attunement_pede: Store an enchanted item and essence, then use its Focus orbs
tooltip.betterenchanting.machine.retriev: Empty-hand use a floating item to retrieve it; sneak-use retrieves everything
gui.betterenchanting.machine.take_all: Use to retrieve every stored item
tooltip.betterenchanting.attunement_focu: Shift-right-click to resonate with nearby amethyst geodes
Use on an enchantment orb to tune priority or select a pedestal upgrade
message.betterenchanting.attunement_focu: No amethyst resonance in the surrounding chunks
jei.betterenchanting.essence_acquisition: Sources: lava fishing (%s); blazes and magma cubes (20%%); Nether Fortress chests (20%%); bastion chests (14%%).
Sources: strays and polar bears (20%); igloo chests (20%); shipwrecks, underwater ruins, and elder guardians (6.67%).
Source: charged creepers killed during a thunderstorm after being hit by a player (%s).
Sources: apprentice armorers (8 emeralds); iron golems and ravagers (15%).
Sources: mining ores with Fortune I or higher (%s); mineshaft, buried-treasure, and stronghold chests (20%%).
Sources: wardens (20%); ancient-city chests (14%); bastion chests (6%); iron golems and ravagers (5%).
Sources: curing a zombie villager (%s); journeyman clerics (12 emeralds).
Sources: phantoms and rabbits (20%); end-city chests (4%); shipwrecks, underwater ruins, and elder guardians (13.33%).
Sources: endermen (20%, plus another 20% roll in the End); end-city chests (16%); ancient-city chests (6%).
Blocks you harvest are smelted as they fall.
enchantment.betterenchanting.beheading.d: A clean strike to the head may claim a trophy.
enchantment.betterenchanting.bleed.desc: Wounds targets, causing them to take damage over time.
Flames at your feet become a brief burst of speed.
enchantment.betterenchanting.curse_of_fr: The item wears down far faster than it should.
enchantment.betterenchanting.curse_of_re: Each blow bites back at its wielder.
Double-tap forward to blink a short distance ahead.
enchantment.betterenchanting.fortunes_to: Preserve fragile blocks while coaxing extra rewards from them.
enchantment.betterenchanting.frostbite.d: Your blows layer biting frost until enemies freeze in place.
enchantment.betterenchanting.gelbound.de: Bounce safely from falls; sneak to land normally.
enchantment.betterenchanting.harvest.des: Gather ripe crops and leave new growth behind.
enchantment.betterenchanting.headshot.de: Well-placed shots strike harder when they hit the head.
enchantment.betterenchanting.overcharged: Survive a lightning strike and surge with strength, healing, and speed.
enchantment.betterenchanting.resonance.d: Breaking an ore sends visible echoes through nearby matching ore blocks.
enchantment.betterenchanting.perfect_str: Time your swing just right to land a devastating blow.
enchantment.betterenchanting.seismic_cus: Sneak as you land to turn a hard fall into a shockwave.
enchantment.betterenchanting.shocking.de: Your attacks leave enemies crackling and vulnerable.
enchantment.betterenchanting.sticky_grip: The drop key cannot loosen this item from your grasp.
enchantment.betterenchanting.tree_capita: Fell a natural tree at level I; level II replants its saplings, including 2x2 trees.
enchantment.betterenchanting.vacuum.desc: Draw nearby loot straight into your inventory.
enchantment.betterenchanting.verdant_reg: Living greenery slowly mends the item over time.
Mine a whole vein with one decisive break.
gamerule.playerGriefing.description: Controls whether player-caused magical effects can alter blocks.
gui.betterenchanting.interactive.enchant: Use with an empty hand to enchant
message.betterenchanting.interactive.ins: Use an item to insert it, sneak-use a modifier, or look at a displayed item to retrieve it
message.betterenchanting.interactive.can: That item cannot be inserted here
tooltip.betterenchanting.option.disabled: Add an essence reagent to open this enchantment pool.
Blocked by %s. Remove it or use another roll.
This item has no roll power. Try a normally enchantable item or a supported tagged item.
No enchantments fit this item. Try another item, essence, or enchanted book.
Those essence tags do not fit this item. Remove the essence or try a matching item.
Modifiers removed every compatible enchantment. Remove a filtering modifier.
This item is full. Remove an enchantment or increase its capacity.
No weighted enchantment could be selected. Change the item or modifiers.
The other offers already claimed the matching enchantments.
The table has not generated this roll. Add shelves or try another slot.
The resulting fusion would exceed this item's enchantment limit.
This item can be infused, but the current Eterna, Quanta, and Arcana do not meet a recipe.
This infusion needs additional modifier-slot inputs.
No enchantment survived the current rules.
tooltip.betterenchanting.slot.target.hel: Place gear, a book, or a supported modded item here.
tooltip.betterenchanting.slot.lapis.help: Place an essence here to open the enchantment pool.
tooltip.betterenchanting.slot.reagent.he: Place an essence here to open the enchantment pool.
tooltip.betterenchanting.slot.modifier.e: Essences focus or filter the enchantment pool.
tooltip.betterenchanting.slot.modifier.o: Nether Stars now power overlevel upgrades at an Attunement Pedestal.
